market.macro_notes_md:
**Chip sell-off (3rd day):** Summit ended May 16 with no major semiconductor policy breakthroughs. NVDA -6.5%, AMD -6%, semis broadly weak.
**NVDA Earnings May 20 AH:** Binary event. Analysts expect $1.78 EPS +120% YoY. Bullish setup but gap risk ±10-20%.
**Iran peace deal:** Trump called off attack, serious negotiations. Oil plunging. Gold falling (-1.78%). GLD stop watch.
**High yields:** PPI +1.4% April. No rate cuts 2026.
**Bitcoin:** ~$79,600 — below $82K re-entry threshold.
